raw_consumer_statement:
We had a deposit on a cruise and learned that the cruise was now on sale. We called a number we thought was XXXX XXXX line and spoke with XXXX XXXX who pretended to work for the cruise company. He said we could get the lower price, but he would need to cancel the original contract and send a new one with the new price. 
He needed our card and we were charged {$18000.00}. We have lots of documents from him on XXXX XXXX  and also transcriptions of voice mails He never provided us with a cruise and when we started an investigation with the card company, XXXX  Bank, they said we were responsible since we gave him our credit card number. We appealed and we were still denied as they can't get in touch with him.
